# ellmos-clatcher-mcp - MCP Utility Toolkit

> clatcher (Claude Patcher) is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that extends AI coding agents with utility tools they do not have natively: file repair, format conversion, duplicate detection, encoding fixes, batch operations, and archive handling. Part of the ellmos MCP family alongside filecommander (filesystem) and codecommander (code intelligence).

Covers 12 tools focused on the fix-and-convert layer: fix_json (strip comments, trailing commas, single quotes, BOM/NUL), fix_encoding (BOM removal, double-encoded UTF-8, cp1252 artifacts), fix_umlauts (German umlaut Mojibake), convert_format (JSON / YAML / TOML / XML / CSV / INI), detect_dupes (SHA256 content hashing), folder_diff (two-directory compare + snapshot), batch_rename (regex with dry-run preview), archive (ZIP create/extract/list), checksum (SHA256 / MD5 / SHA1 / SHA512), cleanup_file (BOM, whitespace, line endings, NUL stripping), scan_emoji (code-file emoji detection), regex_test (pattern debugging with groups).

All destructive tools default to dry-run mode -- writes require explicit `dry_run: false`. 136 tests (vitest) cover all 12 tools, i18n language packs, and repository hygiene. Node.js >= 18, MIT. Published as `ellmos-clatcher-mcp` on npm.

## Docs

- [README (English)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/blob/main/README.md): Tools overview, installation, family context
- [README (Deutsch)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/blob/main/README_de.md): German version
- [server.json](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/blob/main/server.json): MCP Registry metadata for `io.github.ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp`
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT license text
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ellmos-clatcher-mcp): Published artifact

## ellmos MCP family (sibling servers)

- [ellmos-filecommander-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp): Filesystem, process management, interactive sessions (44 tools)
- [ellmos-codecommander-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-codecommander-mcp): Code analysis, AST parsing, import management (17 tools)
- [n8n-manager-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/n8n-manager-mcp): n8n workflow management via MCP (18 tools)
- [ellmos-controlcenter-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-controlcenter-mcp): MCP stack discovery, profile management, control plane (10 tools)
- [ellmos-homebase-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-homebase-mcp): LLM memory, knowledge, state, routing, and orchestration (44 tools, alpha)
- [ellmos-servercommander-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-servercommander-mcp): Server operations: deploy dry-runs, mail status, log analysis, health checks (8 tools, alpha)

## Broader ellmos ecosystem

- [BACH](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/bach): Full text-based OS for LLMs -- primary consumer of the MCP servers
- [Rinnsal](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/rinnsal): Lightweight LLM agent infrastructure
- [USMC](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc): Shared memory primitive

## Optional

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp/issues): Bug reports and feature requests

## Audience

- Developers using Claude Code, Cursor, or MCP-compatible agents who need file repair and format conversion tools without leaving the AI workflow.
- Teams building LLM pipelines that process malformed JSON, broken encodings, or large file collections requiring checksums and deduplication.
- Windows users dealing with cp1252 encoding artifacts, BOM issues, and German umlaut Mojibake.
- CI pipelines and automation workflows that need checksums, format conversion (JSON/YAML/TOML/XML/CSV/INI), or duplicate detection as agent tools.
- Anyone using the ellmos MCP family (FileCommander for filesystem ops, CodeCommander for code intelligence) who needs the file repair and utility tier.

## Search phrases

mcp server json repair; mcp json repair server; fix encoding mcp; mcp encoding fix; format conversion mcp tool; claude code utility tools; cursor mcp utility tools; duplicate file detection mcp; batch rename mcp; checksum mcp; zip archive mcp; fix umlauts mcp; ellmos-clatcher-mcp; clatcher mcp; claude patcher; model context protocol file repair; json fix trailing commas; bom removal mcp; regex batch rename agent; folder diff mcp.
